case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DPT BLG/INSPECTION VS DIANNA LEW AND ROBERT QUON

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $626.00 FILED BY DIANNA LEW AND ROBERT QUON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DPT BLG/INSPECTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIANNA LEW AND ROBERT QUON

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DPT BLG/INSPECTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIANNA LEW AND ROBERT QUON $1,846.27 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,896.27, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DIANNA LEW AND ROBERT QUON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DPT BLG/INSPECTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
